title: About Shivam Sports

hero.heading: Three Generations of Sports Manufacturing
hero.subheading: Factory-direct quality, trusted service, and athlete-first product design.

richText:
SHIVAM SPORTS SHOP is an exclusive online sports shop established by Shivam Enterprises Pvt. Ltd. to provide customers with the best quality sports equipment and services. With over 66 years of experience across 3 generations, we continue to focus on quality and trust.

Our products are delivered directly from manufacturer channels, ensuring authenticity, latest production, and dependable support.
faqQuestions: Are products authentic and factory direct?
Can I place bulk orders for schools or clubs?

seo.title: About Shivam Sports
seo.description: Know more about Shivam Sports legacy, quality and services.

title: Shipping Policy

hero.heading: Shipping and Delivery
hero.subheading: Transparent timelines and secure dispatch process.

richText:
Orders are processed after payment confirmation. Shipping timelines vary by location and stock availability. Tracking information is shared once dispatch is completed.

  • Standard shipping: 3-7 business days
  • Remote areas: may take longer based on courier route
  • Delays due to weather/public holidays may occur
faqQuestions: How long does shipping usually take?

title: Returns Policy

hero.heading: Returns and Replacements
hero.subheading: Simple process for eligible return requests.

richText: Customers can request return for eligible items within policy window if product is unused and in original packaging. Consumables, customized products, and damaged-by-use products are not eligible.
faqQuestions: What is the return policy timeline?

title: Privacy Policy

hero.heading: Your Data, Your Trust
hero.subheading: How we collect and process customer information.

richText:
We collect only essential customer information for order processing, support, and account management. We do not sell customer data to third parties.

Payment processing is handled through trusted gateways with secure encryption controls.

title: Terms and Conditions

hero.heading: Terms of Use
hero.subheading: Rules for accessing and purchasing through our platform.

richText: By using this website, you agree to comply with our terms regarding user conduct, payment handling, pricing, and return conditions. We reserve the right to update policies without prior notice.
